data.name: ResourceYamlView_DryRunSucceededMessage
data.value: The server accepted the manifest using dry-run.

data.name: ResourceListView_Delete_Content
data.value: This will delete {0} items. Are you sure?

data.name: VisualizationView_HideNoiseTooltip
data.value: Hide noisy resources like inactive Replica Sets

data.name: ClusterSettingsView_DebugContainerImageTooltip
data.value: Image used when starting an ephemeral debug container

data.name: PortForwarderListView_Remove_Content
data.value: Remove the Port Forward for {0}/{1}:{2}? Are you sure?

data.name: SettingsView_Logging_ToolTip
data.value: KubeUI logs to the local file system in the <User Profile>/.kubeui/app.log

data.name: SettingsView_Telemetry_ToolTip
data.value: KubeUI gathers telemetry data to help the team improve the product.

data.name: SettingsView_PreRelease_ToolTip
data.value: Allows updates to pre-release versions of KubeUI

data.name: Cluster_Missing_Namespace_Permission_Content
data.value: Your account does not have the necessary permissions to list or watch namespaces. Please enter the names of the namespaces this account should have access to in the Settings window, and then reconnect

data.name: ResourceListView_Restart_Content
data.value: This will restart {0} Resources. Are you sure?

data.name: ImportAksClusterView_Description
data.value: Select a subscription, choose an AKS cluster, and import its kubeconfig into KubeUI.

data.name: ImportAksClusterView_Prerequisites
data.value: Azure CLI must be installed and signed in and run az aks install-cli to install the Kubernetes tools.

data.name: CloudClusterConnectView_Description
data.value: Choose a subscription first, then discover and connect to a managed cluster.

data.name: CloudClusterConnectView_SubscriptionFirst
data.value: Subscription-first discovery is the first implementation step.

data.name: CloudClusterConnectView_AksOnly
data.value: AKS support will be wired up here first.

data.name: ImportAksClusterView_NoSubscriptions
data.value: No Azure subscriptions were found. Sign in to Azure and refresh.

data.name: ImportAksClusterView_AzureCliNotSignedIn
data.value: Azure CLI is not signed in.
